_comment: Multi-entry variant of `dynamic_entries_merged_in_manual_group` (rolldown/rolldown#9729). `index` dynamically imports a/b/c and `index2` dynamically imports a/b; a single `shared-abc` manual code splitting group merges all three matched modules into one chunk. Verifies that with more than one static entry the #9729 fix still holds: every dynamic import is rewritten to load the merged `shared-abc` chunk directly (no per-target re-export proxy chunks) and both entries execute correctly.
